de.uka.ilkd.key.util

Interface DebugMBean

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    Debug

    public interface DebugMBean
    This interface provides the class Debug with the possibility to be administrated from within management tools such as "jconsole". Debugging can be switched on / off dynamically using a mangement console. Also the set of traced classes can be changed
    Author:
    mulbrich

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean getDebugState()
      get the current debug state.
      String getShowOnlyPrefixes()
      get the list of prefixes for which messages are shown.
      void setDebugState(boolean debug)
      set the current debug state.
      void setShowOnlyPrefixes(String showOnlyPrefixes)
      set the list of prefixes for which messages are shown.

    • Method Detail

      • setDebugState

        void setDebugState(boolean debug)
        set the current debug state. If set to true, debug messages are printed to stdout.
        Parameters:
        debug - the new debug state to set

      • getDebugState

        boolean getDebugState()
        get the current debug state. If true, messages are printed, if false, no message gets printed.
        Returns:
        the current debug state

      • getShowOnlyPrefixes

        String getShowOnlyPrefixes()
        get the list of prefixes for which messages are shown. Every message is prefixed with the class name that triggered it. Only if the classname begins with one entry of this list, the message will be displayed-
        Returns:
        a ":"-separated list of prefixes

      • setShowOnlyPrefixes

        void setShowOnlyPrefixes(String showOnlyPrefixes)
        set the list of prefixes for which messages are shown. Every message is prefixed with the class name that triggered it. Only if the classname begins with one entry of this list, the message will be displayed-
        Parameters:
        showOnlyPrefixes - a ":"-separated list of prefixes
